title: Practical Tools Repractiqued
description: Practical Tools Repractiqued adds new tools to the game, adding 3x3 miners and tree capipator axes. and new features to the game. (Compatible with enchants and all Ores)
body:
# 🎨 OLD LOGO 🎨

### !WARNING!
I was remading my mod in intelijj because i hate mcreator. Be carefull with ur items if u update to 3.0 

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c356cb6b09616f0e60d9bbc499b334c0e0a76c7a.png)

##  ADDS 

### 🔨 HAMMER 🔨
The Hammers Mine 3x3 Area




### ⚒️ EXCAVATOR ⚒️
The Excavator mine 3x3 Area


### 🪓 GREATAXE 🪓
The Greataxe Fell trees without leaves




 ![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c356cb6b09616f0e60d9bbc499b334c0e0a76c7a.png)

###  COMPATIBLE ORES 


• Netherite 
• Diamond 
• Gold 
• Iron 
• Wood 
• Stone
